## Type

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ Feature
- [ ] ⚖️ Balance change (data patch via `edit-card`)

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm --filter @claude-royale/shared test` passes
- [ ] `pnpm --filter @claude-royale/client exec tsc --noEmit` passes
- [ ] Game logic changes live in `shared/` (not in the client)
- [ ] Simulation/engine changes include tests
- [ ] Balance changes include a reason and, ideally, simulator output
